name: Temporal Contribution Gate
best_compression: Building matters when it changes a world that will remember it.
low_motivation_when: volatile humans make the world unsafe
minecraft_central_example: Minecraft is motivating when the server/world will stay up, remain active with players, and continuously grow; a temporary or dead world weakens building motivation.
blocking_gate: Do not count building evidence unless it changes future use, safety, durability, or shared/world memory.
